name: a flaming barrel
description: A rusted oil drum, inexplicably ablaze. Flames lick from its open top in rhythmic pulses, as if something inside keeps detonating. The heat is oppressive.
explosionMessages: The barrel erupts in a gout of flame!
Fire bursts from the barrel with a deafening crack!
The barrel belches a wave of searing heat!
An explosion rocks the barrel, sending sparks everywhere!
A column of fire shoots from the barrel, singeing everything nearby!
